Class OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.opensearch.OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
OpenSearchVectorStore
public static class OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder>
Builder class for creating OpenSearchVectorStore instances.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Jemin Huh, Soby Chacko, Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, inpink, Sanghun Lee, chabinhwang

  • Method Details

    • index

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder index(String index)
      Sets the index name.
      Parameters:
      index - The name of the index to use
      Returns:
      The builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if index is null or empty

    • mappingJson

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder mappingJson(String mappingJson)
      Sets the JSON mapping for the index.
      Parameters:
      mappingJson - The JSON mapping to use
      Returns:
      The builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if mappingJson is null or empty

    • initializeSchema

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema, false otherwise
      Returns:
      The builder instance

    • filterExpressionConverter

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder filterExpressionConverter(FilterExpressionConverter converter)
      Sets the filter expression converter.
      Parameters:
      converter - The filter expression converter to use
      Returns:
      The builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if converter is null

    • similarityFunction

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder similarityFunction(String similarityFunction)
      Sets the similarity function for vector comparison. See https://opensearch.org/docs/latest/search-plugins/knn/approximate-knn/#spaces for available functions.
      Parameters:
      similarityFunction - The similarity function to use
      Returns:
      The builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if similarityFunction is null or empty

    • useApproximateKnn

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder useApproximateKnn(boolean useApproximateKnn)
      Sets whether to use approximate k-NN search. If true, the approximate k-NN method is used for faster searches and maintains good performance even at large scales. If false, the exact brute-force k-NN method is used for precise and highly accurate searches.
      Parameters:
      useApproximateKnn - true to use approximate k-NN, false for exact k-NN
      Returns:
      The builder instance
      See Also:
      • Approximate k-NN
      • Exact k-NN with scoring script

    • dimensions

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder dimensions(int dimensions)
      Sets the number of dimensions for the vector embeddings. This is used when creating the index mapping for approximate k-NN. If not set, defaults to 1536 or uses the embedding model's dimensions.
      Parameters:
      dimensions - The number of dimensions
      Returns:
      The builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if dimensions is less than or equal to 0

    • manageDocumentIds

      public OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder manageDocumentIds(boolean manageDocumentIds)
      Sets whether to manage document IDs during indexing operations.

      When set to true (default), document IDs will be explicitly set during indexing operations. When set to false, OpenSearch will auto-generate document IDs, which is required for AWS OpenSearch Serverless vector search collections.

      Note: When document ID management is disabled, the OpenSearchVectorStore.doDelete(List) method may not work as expected since document IDs are auto-generated by OpenSearch.

      Parameters:
      manageDocumentIds - true to manage document IDs (default), false to let OpenSearch auto-generate IDs
      Returns:
      The builder instance

    • build

      public OpenSearchVectorStore build()
      Builds a new OpenSearchVectorStore instance with the configured properties.
      Returns:
      A new OpenSearchVectorStore instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the builder is in an invalid state
